Dry-run preview for Booking bk_01H8XYZA (would_apply: true):

  - booking_status:   "CONFIRMED"  →  "CANCELLED"
  - refunded_amount:  € 0.00  →  € 90.00
  - cancelled_at:     (unset)  →  2026-04-27 10:00 UTC
  - updated_at:       2026-04-20 12:00 UTC  →  2026-04-27 10:00 UTC

Side effects (would run on apply):
  - stripe refund:re_3PqXYZ: amount: 9000 EUR
  - mail BookingCancelledMail: to: customer@example.com

Run without --dry-run to apply.
